connector_names.description: List of human readable connector names that are present in the matched Attack discoveries. Useful for building client filters or summaries.

data.description: Array of matched Attack discovery objects. Each item follows the `AttackDiscoveryApiAlert` schema.

page.description: Current page number of the paginated result set.

per_page.description: Number of items requested per page.

total.description: Total number of Attack discoveries matching the query (across all pages).

unique_alert_ids.description: List of unique alert IDs aggregated from the matched Attack discoveries. Only present if `include_unique_alert_ids=true` in the request.

unique_alert_ids_count.description: Number of unique alert IDs across all matched Attack discoveries. Only present if `include_unique_alert_ids=true` in the request.
